simulation_method: Event-based discrete simulation per operating day
data_source: Synthetic data generator with configurable seed

arrival_patterns.uniform: Equal probability across all time slots
arrival_patterns.peaked_morning: 50% concentration in first third of the day
arrival_patterns.peaked_afternoon: 50% concentration in last third of the day
arrival_patterns.double_peak: Peaks at early morning and early afternoon

risk_score_formula: Risk = 0.25 * (p95 / SLA) + 0.25 * SLA_breach_rate + 0.20 * overtime_prob + 0.15 * clamp(utilization - 0.85, 0, 0.15)/0.15 + 0.15 * (p90_std / p90)
risk_score_weights: Demonstrative, not validated against real operations
key_limitations: Synthetic data only — does not reflect real patient or customer behavior
Does not model seasonality beyond day-of-week variation
Assumes independent arrivals within each day
Service duration distribution is estimated, not measured
No learning effects or server fatigue modeled
No queue priority differentiation beyond FIFO
Not a clinical or medical decision support tool
Does not replace on-site operational evaluation
